title: VibrantPBR
description: A free x128 PBR resource pack with LabPBR support for vanilla textures
body:
# VibrantPBR
This resource pack supports all features of **LabPBR**.
### Including:
- Parallax
- AO[Ambient Occlusion]
- Emission 
- SSS[Sub-Surface Scattering]
- Porosity

![image1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69bfc2f6dece3c858cec3e2b444482b80bd2b686.png)

## 3D Models
Most 3D models are not added more models will be added in the future.

![image2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af92118f522f323d0329b84d758a6c27d01961e7.png)

## How to get the best visual of VibrantPBR
**First**, you need to make sure your shader supports **LabPBR**.                                                     
Here are some recommended shaders
- Sundial
- Nostalgia
- Kappa
- Bliss
- Complementary
- SEUS GFME
- Photon
- BSL 
                                                                                                   
**Second**, make sure you have enabled **all features of LabPBR** and **Parallax** 
## Future
This resource pack is still in development more blocks and models will be added in the future                      
                                                                                                             
![image3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d108e7e758e034c4ac3c3c2f61360da13250fcf.png)
